# @representative/feature-enrolment

React feature workflow package for enrolment screens and user interaction composition.

```text
Name: @representative/feature-enrolment

Type: library

Stage: active

Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-feature
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own enrolment workflow composition and feature-level React state
- Consume domain rules and GraphQL contract operations through public exports
- Expose feature entry points for application routing

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not own transport, cache client creation, or generated GraphQL schema files
- Does not contain reusable design-system primitives
- Does not own cross-context domain policy

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Import from the React app shell through public feature exports
- Use contract and domain packages as dependencies
- Keep adapter integration at the edge of the feature boundary
